name: Clients
description: Client management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting clients.

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Acme Corporation",
    "email": "contact@acme.com",
    "telephone": "123456789",
    "mobile": "987654321",
    "address": "123 Main Street, Suite 400, New York, USA 10001"
}

request.description:
Create a new client for the authenticated company.

**Authentication:** Required (COMPANY role)

**Request Body:**
- name (string, required): 2-150 characters
- email (string, optional): Valid email format
- telephone (string, optional): Max 20 characters
- mobile (string, optional): Max 20 characters
- address (string, optional): Full address details

**Business Logic:**
- Client is associated with the company of the authenticated user
- Name should be unique per company (enforced at service/repository level)

**Response:** Created client object with metadata (id, timestamps, archived flag).

response.name: Create Client - Success
response.body:
{
    "id": 1,
    "clientRef": 1,
    "name": "Acme Corporation",
    "email": "contact@acme.com",
    "telephone": "123456789",
    "mobile": "987654321",
    "address": "123 Main Street, Suite 400, New York, USA 10001",
    "archived": false,
    "createdAt": "2025-11-08T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2025-11-08T10:00:00"
}

request.description:
Retrieve all clients for the authenticated company.

**Authentication:** Required (COMPANY role)

**Response:** Array of client objects (same format as Create Client response)

**Note:** Returns all clients (including archived) belonging to the company.

response.name: Get All Clients - Success
response.body:
[
    {
        "id": 1,
        "clientRef": 1,
        "name": "Acme Corporation",
        "email": "contact@acme.com",
        "telephone": "123456789",
        "mobile": "987654321",
        "address": "123 Main Street, Suite 400, New York, USA 10001",
        "archived": false,
        "createdAt": "2025-11-08T10:00:00",
        "updatedAt": "2025-11-08T10:00:00"
    }
]

request.description:
Retrieve a specific client by ID.

**Authentication:** Required (COMPANY role)

**Path Parameter:**
- id (long): Client ID

**Response:** Client object (same format as Create Client response)

**Authorization:** Only clients belonging to the authenticated company can be accessed.

response.name: Get Client by ID - Success
response.body:
{
    "id": 1,
    "clientRef": 1,
    "name": "Acme Corporation",
    "email": "contact@acme.com",
    "telephone": "123456789",
    "mobile": "987654321",
    "address": "123 Main Street, Suite 400, New York, USA 10001",
    "archived": false,
    "createdAt": "2025-11-08T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2025-11-08T10:00:00"
}

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Acme Corporation Ltd.",
    "email": "support@acme.com",
    "telephone": "555555555",
    "mobile": "999999999",
    "address": "456 Oak Avenue, New York, USA 10002",
    "archived": false
}

request.description:
Update an existing client's details.

**Authentication:** Required (COMPANY role)

**Path Parameter:**
- id (long): Client ID

**Request Body:**
- name (string, optional): 2-150 characters
- email (string, optional): Valid email format
- telephone (string, optional): Max 20 characters
- mobile (string, optional): Max 20 characters
- address (string, optional): Full address details
- archived (boolean, optional): Archive status

**Response:** Updated client object

**Authorization:** Only clients belonging to the authenticated company can be updated.

response.name: Update Client - Success

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Acme Corporation Ltd.",
    "email": "support@acme.com",
    "telephone": "555555555",
    "mobile": "999999999",
    "address": "456 Oak Avenue, New York, USA 10002",
    "archived": false
}

response.body:
{
    "id": 1,

request.description:
Soft delete (archive) a client by ID.

**Authentication:** Required (COMPANY role)

**Path Parameter:**
- id (long): Client ID

**Response:** 204 No Content

**Business Logic:**
- Sets client.archived = true
- Client remains in database but is marked as archived
- Archived clients still appear in getAllClients() but are counted separately in dashboard

**Authorization:** Only clients belonging to the authenticated company can be deleted.
